purpose: Issue formal certificates confirming a fact, status, completion, or participation.
typical_use_cases: Confirming completion of a training or program
selection_hints: The request explicitly mentions a 'certificate' or proof of status
The output is a short, formal confirmation document
The institution needs to attest to a fact in an official form

header.purpose: Identify the issuing institution and unit.

reference_info.purpose: Provide registration or reference numbers if applicable.

title.purpose: State the type of certificate (e.g., Employment Certificate).

certification_statement.purpose: Formally state that the institution certifies a fact or status.

subject_details.purpose: Describe the person or entity to whom the certificate refers.

scope_and_limits.purpose: Explain what is and is not covered by the certificate.

validity_period.purpose: Indicate any validity dates or conditions, if applicable.

date_and_place.purpose: Record where and when the certificate is issued.

attachments_note.purpose: List any annexes or supporting documents that accompany the certificate.

signature_block.purpose: Provide the name, title, and signature line for the authorized representative.

planner_notes: Use this format when the institution must formally attest to a fact or status in a concise document. Ensure that the structure makes the certified fact, subject, and scope clear. Delegate exact phrasing and institutional tone to GILE.
